title: 心好煩... 明知無好結果

replies.msg:
You, yes you.
We may not have that fairy-tale like Hi - Hello
The first time I saw you, nothing was special.
Thought it was just a random “ Would you like a drink “ kinda night.
Time slowly passed, we had no idea how fast.
Selfishly, I gotta admit. I saw someone else in you which made me stay.
I always say I don’t need guy friends but seems like this friendship nothing can pay.
The more I think, the deeper I sink, the harder I’m getting back to the surface.
I realised I was wrong, I didn’t see someone in you. I saw something new in you.
I overthought, I was stupid, I’m a loser.
I kept telling myself that I have finally found closure.
Cause these guys are funny, naughty and real.
Not till I found myself start falling for you,
I liked it when you would tease me.
I liked it when you would stop them from bullying me.
I liked the fact that you always want to call me but you would make them call me instead.
I liked how you call me fei mui.
thats when things started fucking up,
Because I just liked everything you did. facts cannot be concealed.
I’m confused.
Am I the one who doesn’t know what I’m feeling, or do you think the same? My dear.
There’s so much I wanna tell you.
But I never felt that you wanna hear.
Maybe we are good to call each other friends in times of enjoyments but not in times of sorrow.
And I’m sorry that I gotta go.
You said you like me.
You said we could be besties.
Yes, but I’m tired of pretending.
Yes, I can say yes, lets be friends.
But how long can I act.
To even act one second longer is hurting me.
Enjoying your company while knowing someone shares the same is a nightmare.
I want a relief, and I know how.
Once I’m gone, all of these will finally come to an end.
Sometimes, losing something is not a loss. It could be blessings, gains and happiness.

Without you, I am a flower quickly fading.
too long
本來係send 俾佢

ching做咩事ar
可以share?

日日都好唔開心 明明大家都鍾意大家 識左成年先夠膽講 但原來佢有女朋友.... 佢仲要話： I really like you, I have feelings for you but I love someone else. 想點阿究竟！ 我話走 又唔俾我走 每日打30-40次電話黎，我好辛苦。仲話唔可以無左我，要我一世做佢好朋友，又話佢重朋友，為左朋友，可以唔要女朋友，又話我重要d，但我始終都係個女仔黎，幫住明明好鍾意都要扮無野，好辛苦。

like the way you express btw

ever thought of confessing to him?

replies.msg:
一腳踏兩船
正仆街黎
如果佢講到你咁重要，早就飛左條女同你一齊
依家同緊條女一齊又唔想放你走，姐係明玩你啦
同埋佢話為左朋友，可以唔要女朋友，佢可以唔要前一個，咁你同佢一齊都可以為左第二個飛你
依d咁既仆街真係唔值得你鐘意
你自己小心啦
